Fix Gradle SIGSEGV crash in Docker builds on ARM (Apple Silicon)

Switch build stage from eclipse-temurin:21-jdk-alpine to eclipse-temurin:21-jdk
to avoid musl libc native library crash, and add --no-watch-fs flag.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Simplify connection path in architecture diagram

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update architecture diagram via draw.io desktop editor

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement distributed web crawler with 6 microservices

Java 21 / Spring Boot 3.2 / Kafka-based pipeline:
- Seed URL Controller: REST API for submitting crawl seeds
- URL Frontier: politeness-enforced, disk-backed URL queue
- HTML Downloader (x3): virtual thread downloads with robots.txt
- Link Extractor (x2): Jsoup-based link parsing
- URL Filter: extension/domain/depth filtering
- URL Seen: Bloom filter + PostgreSQL deduplication

Includes Docker Compose (14 containers), Prometheus/Grafana
monitoring, unit tests, README, and draw.io architecture diagram.

- display.print_table() adds Owner email column between Type and Modified

index.htmlのメールアドレスをtutoloop01@gmail.comに変更

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix price display: use unicode escape for $ and inline styles

- Use \u0024 instead of $ to avoid template literal conflicts
- Use string concatenation instead of template literals for price HTML
- All price styles are inline to rule out CSS issues
- Add fallback "Precio no disponible" message

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix: 15 bugs across crawler, database, and C++ algorithms

Python:
- main.py: fix DomainRateLimiter sleeping inside global lock (serialized all workers)
- main.py: add TCPConnector with per-host limits and DNS cache for stable connections
- main.py: replace bare timeout=int with aiohttp.ClientTimeout objects throughout
- main.py: increment stats['scanned'] so MAX_PAGES_TOTAL limit is actually enforced
- main.py: restore visited set from persisted state on resume to skip re-fetching
- main.py: bound Playwright context creation with semaphore (prevents resource exhaustion)
- main.py: fix process_html double-applying urldefrag/urljoin on already-absolute links
- main.py: add proxy to recover_blacklist re-checks (avoids false IP-based negatives)
- main.py: guard _load_blacklist against adding empty strings from blank lines
- database.py: protect all JSONL reads/writes with asyncio.Lock (prevents concurrent corruption)
- database.py: convert _remove_jsonl_entry to async using aiofiles (unblocks event loop)
- database.py: make delete_page async to match

C++:
- pagerank.cpp: add dangling node rank redistribution (fixes rank mass leakage)
- pagerank.cpp: fix graph merge to insert instead of overwrite on duplicate URLs
- pagerank.cpp: fix JSON parser to handle both "links": [ and "links":[ variants
- pagerank.cpp: use thread-local accumulators to reduce lock contention per iteration
- simhash.cpp: replace O(N^2) pairwise scan with pigeonhole block-based LSH
  (4 blocks of 16 bits guarantees zero false negatives for Hamming distance <= 3)

Housekeeping:
- .gitignore: add blacklist.txt; untrack compiled binaries and blacklist from repo

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add live watcher with smoothing, name filter, settled-frame check, card fixes

New: src/watch.py — live game state display with action reconstruction
- Picks widest ACR window (multi-table support)
- Min window width filter (skips small tiled windows)
- Settled-frame check: captures twice, skips if window is animating
- ReadingSmoother: per-card majority vote + lock-in after 2 consistent reads
- Human-readable output: board, hero, positions, stacks, solver inputs

Pipeline fixes (src/pipeline.py):
- Name filter: strips OCR'd action words (FOLD, CALL, RAISE, CHECK, etc.)
  from player name field, including fuzzy matches (FOI D, CHFCK, etc.)
- Filters SITTING OUT, DON'T SHOW, POST SB/BB variants

Card ID fixes (src/card_id.py):
- 6/J discrimination: if best match is J but character is wider than 17px,
  re-score against wider ranks (6 is 19px, J is only 15px)
- Board card deduplication: skip duplicate cards (same rank+suit can't
  appear twice on the board)

New reference screenshots: 23, 24 (4-color deck, live captures)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

opus-2026-03-06-S11b: spectral bipartite structure in tiling skeleton

Within the H=9 class at n=5, the 18 tilings split into two spectral
sub-classes (tr2=33 and tr2=37) forming a BIPARTITE cross-spectral
flip graph. Sub-class B has block-diagonal M with 2±sqrt(5) eigenvalues
(golden ratio connection). The dH=0 cross-spectral flips are the
source of H-spectral perpendicularity at mid-H values.

fix(ui): make zone prompt template and trigger behavior optional (#755)

Zones can be organizational containers without triggers. Previously,
the ZoneConfigModal required a prompt template to save, blocking users
from creating trigger-less zones. Now trigger behavior and template are
both optional — save is only blocked when behavior is set but template
is empty (incomplete config).

commit.message:
Make manifest file sha256 optional for multi-file downloads

HuggingFace tree API only provides SHA-256 for LFS files (>10MB).
Small config/json files only have git oids. Skip verification for
entries without a sha256 hash while still verifying large files.

commit.message:
feat(baseball): Sprint 1 — foundation + data pipeline (72/72 tests)

Core infrastructure:
- FastAPI app (main.py) with 6-phase lifespan startup
- SQLAlchemy ORM: 8 models (games, teams, players, pitcher_stats,
  batter_stats, park_factors, elo_history, market_prices)
- In-memory SQLite fallback + Railway PostgreSQL support

Data pipeline:
- MLB Stats API client (schedule, lineups, live feed, player stats)
- Optic Odds Baseball client (fixtures, live scores, pre-match odds)
- Open-Meteo weather service (wind/temp run-scoring adjustments)
- Park factors service: all 30 MLB parks, 5-year regressed (built-in)
- Player name mapper: Levenshtein fuzzy matching, accent normalisation

Baseball-specific services:
- FiveThirtyEight ELO: K=6/8, HCA=+24pts, FIP-to-ELO adjustment
  (FIP 3.00 = +80 ELO, FIP 5.00+ = -70 ELO), season regression 60/40
- Weather: effective wind toward CF bearing, run-scoring factor
- Park factors: Coors 1.371, Petco 0.912, all 30 parks calibrated

API routes:
- GET /health, /health/ready, /health/live
- GET /api/v1/baseball/feeds/status
- GET /api/v1/baseball/feeds/schedule
- GET /api/v1/baseball/feeds/lineups/{game_pk}
- POST /api/v1/baseball/feeds/refresh

Tests: 72/72 passing (ELO x15, park factors x10, weather x4,
name mapper x14, DB models x11, health API x6)

commit.message:
feat(canons): create STRATEGY_CATALOG_CANONICAL — unified strategy registry

27 strategies registered across 5 blocks (perp/spot/defi/yield/equity):
- Phase 0 (live): S7 Trend Following, S8 Funding Harvest, S9 Mean Reversion, SZA
- Phase 0 (yaml_ready): S1-S6 (funding_mr, oi_breakout, liq_sweep, regime_trend, basis_trade, cascade_liq)
- Phase 1-3: S10-S21, DeFi, Yield, EQ-1 to EQ-3

Each strategy has gates pipeline: technique_yaml → feature_map → backtest → paper → live

Also adds S7/S8/S9 to STRATEGY_FEATURE_MAP_CANONICAL.yaml (were live but missing from feature map).
